name: FreshBooks
description: FreshBooks is a cloud-based accounting and invoicing platform for freelancers and small businesses. The API lets you manage clients, create and send invoices, track expenses, log time entries, and handle payments programmatically.

capabilities.name: list_clients
capabilities.description: List all clients for an account, including their contact details and billing information.

capabilities.name: create_client
capabilities.description: Create a new client with their name, email, organization, and billing address.

capabilities.name: create_invoice
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a client with line items, payment terms, and due date.

capabilities.name: list_invoices
capabilities.description: List all invoices for an account with optional filtering by status, date range, or client.

capabilities.name: create_expense
capabilities.description: Record a new business expense with category, amount, vendor, and optional receipt.

capabilities.name: list_expenses
capabilities.description: List all recorded expenses with optional filtering by date, category, or vendor.

capabilities.name: create_time_entry
capabilities.description: Log a time entry for a client or project with duration, description, and billable status.

capabilities.name: list_payments
capabilities.description: List all payments received across invoices, including payment method and date.
